topic.what: privacy-preserving semantic verification of proprietary data using LLM agents inside TEEs
topic.how: three-agent architecture (Verifier/Prover/Auditor) with binary query interface, transcript hash chains, and MCP-based data inspection
topic.why_matters: bridges gap between ZKPs (algebraic only) and qualitative/unstructured verification needs for codebases, regulatory compliance, due diligence

characteristics.what_it_measures: theoretical bound on data extraction via binary oracle queries
characteristics.context: with standard budget Kmax=40, renders reconstruction of high-entropy secrets combinatorially infeasible

characteristics.what_it_measures: end-to-end time for complete multi-question audit
characteristics.evidence: Table 4: 21 GitHub repos, 5 complex questions, range 1182-5100s
characteristics.context: dominated by LLM inference (88-99% of runtime)

characteristics.what_it_measures: maximum number of binary questions verifier can ask
characteristics.context: enforced by TEE-based Auditor to bound information leakage

characteristics.what_it_measures: number of MCP tool calls Auditor makes to inspect codebase per question
characteristics.evidence: Table 4: simple queries 2-13 calls; complex queries 30-888 calls
characteristics.context: varies with question complexity; limited by Nqueries budget

characteristics.what_it_measures: accuracy of Q1/Q2 verdicts on paper-codebase matching
characteristics.evidence: verified against control with incorrect papers; Gemini CLI agreed on all Q1/Q2 answers

characteristics.what_it_measures: fraction of runtime spent on LLM inference
characteristics.evidence: Tables 2-4: LLM dominates all experiment runs
characteristics.context: indicates audit performance is bound by LLM latency

characteristics.what_it_measures: TEE enclave image size for Auditor
characteristics.evidence: Distroless Docker image with minimal TCB
characteristics.context: aims to minimize trusted computing base

open_problems: constant-time LLM implementations for timing attack mitigation
confidential inference services from frontier LLM providers
detecting indirect prompt injection in corpus
extending to legal/provable audit evidence standards
